    "gradient accumulation for larger effective batch",
    "sequence packing for padded transformer batches",
    "KV-cache memory budget before autoregressive inference",

    "custom CUDA kernels: budget 227KB block shared memory and 64 warps/SM",
    "custom CUDA kernels: cluster size 16 only for B200-only opt-in path",
    "evaluate MLOPart/MPS only for latency-sensitive B200 serving A/B tests",
    "use nvCOMP hardware decompression for Snappy/LZ4/Deflate input pipelines"
  ],
  "avoid_patterns": [
    "no 192GB sizing on current DGX/HGX B200 deployments",
    "no MIG for jobs needing full-GPU collectives",
    "no topology-blind NCCL plan across NVSwitch/IB boundary",
    "no FP4 default without accuracy validation",
    "no CUDA extension missing sm_100 target",
    "no cluster size 16 in portable CUDA kernels",
    "no MLOPart for strict tenant isolation; use MIG instead",
    "no decompression-engine dependency without allocation-type check and nvCOMP fallback"
  ],
  "feature_query": {
    "tool": "query_hardware_features",
    "hardware_name": "NVIDIA B200",
    "stage": "all"
  }
}

    ]

      "SOAP optimizer: Shampoo run in the eigenbasis of its own preconditioner, then plain Adam in that rotated space, mainly used for optimizer experiments that are benchmarked against a stable AdamW baseline."

      "AdEMAMix optimizer: augments Adam's fast gradient EMA with a second very-slow EMA, mainly used for optimizer experiments that are benchmarked against a stable AdamW baseline."

      "nvImageCodec GPU decode moves image decoding directly onto the GPU, mainly used for computer-vision and imaging data loaders."
    ],
    [
      "fp8_rowwise_scaling",
      "FP8 rowwise scaling defines a numeric precision or scaling policy, mainly used for datatype and mixed-precision policy."
    ],
    [
      "fp8_all_gather_fsdp2",
      "FP8 all-gather for FSDP2 reduces distributed parameter communication volume, mainly used for multi-GPU distributed training."
    ]
  ],
  "recommended_patterns": [
    "bf16 autocast default",
    "TF32 matmul via set_float32_matmul_precision('high')",
    "activation checkpointing for long sequence or high resolution training",
    "gradient accumulation before raising physical batch",
    "sequence packing default for padded transformer batches",
    "KV-cache memory budget before autoregressive inference",
    "quantized inference before increasing context",
    "fp8 via transformer_engine for validated transformer recipes"
  ],
  "avoid_patterns": [
    "no FP64-heavy ML",
    "no fp8 as default for unvalidated recipes",
    "no high physical batch before accumulation/packing"
  ],

    "tool": "query_hardware_features",
    "hardware_name": "NVIDIA RTX 4500 Ada Generation",

    [
      "soap_optimizer",
      "SOAP optimizer: Shampoo run in the eigenbasis of its own preconditioner, then plain Adam in that rotated space, mainly used for optimizer experiments that are benchmarked against a stable AdamW baseline."
    ],
    [
      "ademamix_optimizer",
      "AdEMAMix optimizer: augments Adam's fast gradient EMA with a second very-slow EMA, mainly used for optimizer experiments that are benchmarked against a stable AdamW baseline."
    ]
  ],

    ],
    [

    ],
    [

    ],
    [
      "cut_cross_entropy",
      "Cut Cross-Entropy fuses the classifier projection with cross-entropy loss to avoid materializing large logits, mainly used for large-vocabulary language-model heads."
    ],
    [
      "dataset_decomposition",
      "Dataset decomposition buckets training data into curriculum-friendly chunks, mainly used for long-context or variable-length dataset pipelines."
    ],
    [
      "nvimagecodec_gpu_decode",
      "nvImageCodec GPU decode moves image decoding directly onto the GPU, mainly used for computer-vision and imaging data loaders."
    ]
  ],

    "bf16 autocast default",
    "TF32 matmul via set_float32_matmul_precision('high')",
    "activation checkpointing default for transformer/diffusion training",
    "gradient accumulation default with small physical batch",
    "KV-cache memory budget before autoregressive inference",
    "quantized inference first for autoregressive/generative inference"
  ],

    "no throughput plan based on large physical batch",

  "conditional_feature_keys": [

    ],
    [
      "soap_optimizer",
      "SOAP optimizer: Shampoo run in the eigenbasis of its own preconditioner, then plain Adam in that rotated space, mainly used for optimizer experiments that are benchmarked against a stable AdamW baseline."
    ],
    [

    ],
    [

      "Cut Cross-Entropy fuses the classifier projection with cross-entropy loss to avoid materializing large logits, mainly used for large-vocabulary language-model heads."
    ],

      "dataset_decomposition",
      "Dataset decomposition buckets training data into curriculum-friendly chunks, mainly used for long-context or variable-length dataset pipelines."

    [
      "nvimagecodec_gpu_decode",
      "nvImageCodec GPU decode moves image decoding directly onto the GPU, mainly used for computer-vision and imaging data loaders."

    "bf16 autocast default",
    "TF32 matmul via set_float32_matmul_precision('high')",
    "activation checkpointing default for transformer/diffusion training",
    "gradient accumulation default with small physical batch",
    "KV-cache memory budget before autoregressive inference",
    "quantized inference first for autoregressive/generative inference"
  ],

    "no fp8 (sm_86 lacks FP8 Tensor Core path)",
    "no throughput plan based on large physical batch",
    "no Ada/Hopper/Blackwell-only kernels (no FP4, no 5th-gen TC)"

      "AdEMAMix optimizer: augments Adam's fast gradient EMA with a second very-slow EMA, mainly used for optimizer experiments that are benchmarked against a stable AdamW baseline."
    ],
    [
      "cut_cross_entropy",
      "Cut Cross-Entropy fuses the classifier projection with cross-entropy loss to avoid materializing large logits, mainly used for large-vocabulary language-model heads."
    ],
    [
      "dataset_decomposition",
      "Dataset decomposition buckets training data into curriculum-friendly chunks, mainly used for long-context or variable-length dataset pipelines."
    ],
    [
      "nvimagecodec_gpu_decode",
      "nvImageCodec GPU decode moves image decoding directly onto the GPU, mainly used for computer-vision and imaging data loaders."
    ]
  ],
  "recommended_patterns": [
    "bf16 autocast default",
    "TF32 matmul via set_float32_matmul_precision('high')",
    "quantized inference (INT8/INT4) as primary path for edge deployment",
    "KV-cache memory budget before autoregressive inference",
    "activation checkpointing default for transformer training",
    "gradient accumulation default with small physical batch"
  ],
  "avoid_patterns": [
    "no fp8 (sm_86 lacks FP8 Tensor Core path)",
    "no throughput plan based on large physical batch",
    "no Ada/Hopper/Blackwell-only kernels (no FP4, no 5th-gen TC)"
  ],

    "tool": "query_hardware_features",
    "hardware_name": "NVIDIA A2",

      "Cut Cross-Entropy fuses the classifier projection with cross-entropy loss to avoid materializing large logits, mainly used for large-vocabulary language-model heads."

      "nvImageCodec GPU decode moves image decoding directly onto the GPU, mainly used for computer-vision and imaging data loaders."

    "bf16 autocast default",
    "TF32 matmul via set_float32_matmul_precision('high')",
    "activation checkpointing default for transformer/diffusion training",
    "gradient accumulation default with small physical batch",
    "KV-cache memory budget before autoregressive inference",
    "quantized inference first for autoregressive/generative inference",
    "NVLink for 2-GPU memory pooling up to 96 GB (112.5 GB/s bidirectional)"
  ],
  "avoid_patterns": [
    "no fp8 (sm_86 lacks FP8 Tensor Core path)",
    "no throughput plan based on large physical batch",
    "no Ada/Hopper/Blackwell-only kernels (no FP4, no 5th-gen TC)"
  ],

    [

    ],

      "ademamix_optimizer",
      "AdEMAMix optimizer: augments Adam's fast gradient EMA with a second very-slow EMA, mainly used for optimizer experiments that are benchmarked against a stable AdamW baseline."

    "activation checkpointing when activation memory dominates",
    "gradient accumulation before raising physical batch",
    "quantized inference before increasing context or batch",

    "use NVFP4/MXFP8 only when serving stack has sm_120 kernels"

    "no NVLink/SLI multi-GPU plan on GeForce RTX 50",
